description:
cloudstack_template

Use this datasource to get the ID of a template for use in other resources.

argument_reference.name: template_filter
argument_reference.description: The template filter. Possible values are featured, self, selfexecutable, sharedexecutable, executable and community (see the Cloudstack API listTemplate command documentation).

argument_reference.name: filter
argument_reference.description: One or more name/value pairs to filter off of. You can apply filters on any exported attributes.

attributes_reference.name: account
attributes_reference.description: The account name to which the template belongs.

attributes_reference.name: created
attributes_reference.description: The date this template was created.

attributes_reference.name: hypervisor
attributes_reference.description: The hypervisor on which the templates runs.
